module_map.responsibility: File metadata extraction and caching. Collects filesystem attributes (permissions, size, date, owner, git status, symlinks, inodes) and provides structured Meta type for downstream processing.
submodules: meta/name.rs - filename/path handling with display options
meta/size.rs - file size calculations and formatting
meta/date.rs - modification/access/creation date parsing and formatting
meta/owner.rs - user/group ID resolution with caching (OwnerCache)
meta/filetype.rs - file type classification (regular, directory, symlink, device, socket, etc.)
key_types: Meta - core struct with all file attributes
OwnerCache - LRU cache for user/group lookups

module_map.responsibility: CLI argument parsing and configuration aggregation. Converts command-line flags into normalized display preferences (blocks, sort order, colors, icons, layout).
submodules: flags/blocks.rs - display block configuration (permission, size, date, name, etc.) and ordering
flags/sorting.rs - sort column and order configuration
flags/layout.rs - display layout selection (grid, tree, one-per-line)
key_types: Flags - primary config struct aggregating all flag types
Block - individual column type enum (Permission, Name, Size, Date, etc.)

module_map.responsibility: Output formatting and layout rendering. Converts Meta + Flags into terminal-ready strings with grid/tree layout, padding, alignment, colorization, and hyperlinks.
key_types: DisplayOption - controls how Meta names are rendered
Grid - term_grid wrapper for columnar layout

module_map.responsibility: Sorting logic orchestration. Implements all sort strategies (by name, size, date, extension, version, git status) as composable sort functions applied in sequence.
key_types: SortFn - sort function type (closure that compares Meta items)

module_map.responsibility: Color theme resolution and application. Maps file attributes to semantic colors (executable=red, directory=blue, etc.) using user theme or fallback defaults.
submodules: theme/color.rs - color palette definitions and attribute-to-color mapping
theme/icon.rs - icon symbol selection by file type/extension
key_types: ColoredString - output string with ANSI codes

module_map.responsibility: Orchestration and control flow. Main pipeline: fetch (Meta::from_path) → sort (sort module) → display (display module). Manages exit codes and error handling.
Git repository detection and status lookup. Caches git status per repo to avoid repeated queries.
key_types: GitStatus - per-file git status (staged, modified, untracked, etc.)

data_flow.entry_point: core.rs::Core::fetch() calls Meta::from_path for each input path
data_flow.description: Stat filesystem for each file; extract permissions, size, date, owner, type, git status. Recursively build content[] for directories.
types_produced: Meta - struct with name, path, permissions_or_attributes, date, owner, file_type, size, symlink, indicator, inode, links, content (recursive), git_status

data_flow.entry_point: core.rs::Core::sort() reads flags.sorting and composes sort functions
data_flow.description: Iterate over sort columns in Flags and build sort function chain. Apply comparators to Meta items (compare name, size, date, ext, version, git status in sequence).

data_flow.entry_point: display.rs::get_output() calls icon resolution per Meta
data_flow.description: For each Meta, match file type (dir/exe/symlink/ext) against icon theme. Lookup by extension, filename, or category. Return symbol string.
types_produced: Icon - symbol string from theme (e.g. '' for directories)

data_flow.description: For each Meta attribute (name, size, date, perms), match type+indicator to color theme. Wrap in ANSI codes. Handle git status, special file types, executables.
types_produced: ColoredString - String with embedded ANSI escape sequences

data_flow.key_function: get_output(meta: &Meta, owner_cache: &OwnerCache, colors: &Colors, flags: &Flags, icons: &Icons, git_theme: &GitTheme) -> Vec<String>
data_flow.entry_point: display.rs::inner_display_grid/tree iterate over Metas and call get_output
data_flow.description: For each block in Flags::blocks, format corresponding Meta field (permission render, size format, date format, owner lookup, name with icon). Return one Vec<String> per Meta (one cell per block).
types_produced: Vec<String> - one colored string per column (block)

data_flow.description: Collect all Meta → Vec<String> outputs; compute column widths (detect_size_lengths, get_padding_rules). Build term_grid Grid struct with Cell objects. Apply header if requested. Render grid to terminal with alignment and padding.

cross_module_hubs.reason: Central data type produced by fetch stage; consumed by sort, display, and color modules. Every file is represented as Meta. Submodules contain specialized attribute extractors that Meta::from_path orchestrates.
Configuration container passed to every major function (sort, display, color, icon). Bridges CLI (app.rs) to all downstream logic. Changes to flag structure affect display, sort, color pipelines.

Final output stage consuming Meta, Flags, Colors, Icons, GitTheme. Imports from meta, flags (including blocks), color, icon, sort modules. Orchestrates layout (grid vs tree), hyperlinks, and terminal formatting.

change_proposal.title: Add SHA-256 checksum display column
files_to_modify: src/meta/mod.rs - Add checksum field to Meta struct
src/meta/checksum.rs (new) - Extract SHA-256 from file using std::fs, create Checksum type with display and format methods
src/flags/blocks.rs - Add Checksum block variant to Block enum and get_header() match
src/display.rs - Update get_output() to render checksum block; add to padding calculation
src/sort.rs - Add checksum sort comparator (lexicographic on hex string)
new_types: meta::Checksum - struct { sha256: [u8; 32], hex: String } with Display impl
Block::Checksum - new variant in flags/blocks.rs Block enum
change_proposal.pattern_to_follow: meta::Size pattern: extract in Meta::from_path via method call, store Option<T>, render in get_output() via block match with colorize/formatting, include in sort chain. Blocks pattern: add to Block enum, add header string, add to Blocks::long() constructor.
change_proposal.integration_point: Checksum extraction happens in Meta::from_path (after stat, before return). Rendering happens in display.rs::get_output() via block dispatch (similar to Size, Date blocks). Icon theme unchanged. Color theme needs new Elem variant (e.g. Elem::Checksum) for theming checksum color.
risks: Performance: SHA-256 on all files in large directories will be slow (requires full file read). Mitigate with lazy evaluation or --checksum-only flag.
Compatibility: Windows file handling uses different stat paths; ensure Checksum::from_path works cross-platform using generic std::fs::File I/O.
Display width: SHA-256 hex is 64 chars, may exceed terminal width; coordinate with display.rs truncation logic (unicode_width).
Cache invalidation: GitCache pattern shows caching is important; consider mtime-based cache for checksums to avoid re-hashing on repeated runs.
Integration with recursive content: Meta::recurse_into builds content[] for directories; ensure checksums are computed consistently for nested files.

tool_usage.purpose: Establish module hierarchy and LOC/function counts; identified 52 files across 7 top-level modules
Extract function signatures, imports, and type definitions to map data flow and dependencies
Trace metadata collection entry point; identified 15 callers and 22 callees; confirmed call chain from fetch → from_path → meta submodule extraction
Trace rendering pipeline; identified 5 callers (grid, tree, inner_display_*) and 26 callees (colorize, date_string, render, icon resolution); confirmed block-by-block output generation

tool_usage.command: rg 'use crate::' src/ and grep in core.rs, display.rs, color.rs, sort.rs
tool_usage.purpose: Identify top cross-module imports; found meta, flags, colors, icons, git, display as primary dependencies
